generated_oml:
namespace base = "http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#"
namespace DTDFVocab = "http://example.org/DTDFVocab"

instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensor providing real-time operational data for building systems",
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance LightSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Light sensor providing real-time operational data for building systems",
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Occupancy sensor providing real-time operational data for building systems",
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance LightDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightSensor
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data from physical sensors",
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance LightData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time light level data from physical sensors",
    DTDFVocab:fromData LightDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy data from physical sensors",
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for IoT device connectivity",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto for digital twin management",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, BuildingPerformanceSimulationService
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 for interactive 3D visualization",
    DTDFVocab:enables InteractiveVisualizationService
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineeringTools : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-driven engineering tools for BIM-based transformations and deployment framework automating semantics extraction and runtime interface generation validated via ODTE metric",
    DTDFVocab:enables BuildingPerformanceSimulationService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of building systems for operational status",
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for energy optimization (BOREALIS)",
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight
]

instance BuildingPerformanceSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation of building performance for operational decisions",
    DTDFVocab:provides BuildingPerformanceInsight
]

instance InteractiveVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization using Unreal Engine 5",
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance EnergyOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Recommendations for energy consumption reduction based on predictive analytics"
]

instance BuildingPerformanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights from building performance simulation for operational decisions"
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring data insights for operational status"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization insights for building management"
]

instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator for lighting control within Building Control Systems (BCS)"
]

instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator for HVAC control within Building Control Systems (BCS)"
]

instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM model enriched with runtime semantics for devices and control logic, including geometric, spatial, and functional data",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringTools
]

instance BuildingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Building infrastructure in AECO domain for real-time monitoring and optimization",
    base:contains TemperatureSensor, LightSensor, OccupancySensor, LightingActuator, HVACActuator
]

instance BuildingSystem : DTDFVocab:SystemUnderStudy [
    base:desc "Building infrastructure in AECO domain for real-time monitoring, simulation, and life cycle optimization",
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment BuildingEnvironment
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals generated by the DT's services (e.g., optimization algorithms) sent through Ditto to BCS actuators for physical adjustments, such as adjusting lighting levels or HVAC settings."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with continuous data exchange between physical and virtual components, maintaining live operational status for immediate decision-making."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A modular, service-oriented architecture where BIM models act as the semantic foundation, integrated with Hono/Ditto middleware for bidirectional data exchange and Unreal Engine for interactive visualization, enabling scalable DT services."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers the entire building life cycle from design through construction, operation, and refurbishment phases, with BIM serving as the semantic backbone for all stages."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Evaluated using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric to ensure interoperability and architectural soundness, verifying the alignment between physical and virtual components."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono and Ditto middleware facilitating real-time data exchange between physical assets and the DT, utilizing IoT protocols for sensor and actuator communication."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "BIM standards (e.g., IFC) for semantic modeling, and integration with standardized middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) for interoperable data exchange protocols."
]
